final:
module RefModule(
  input CLK, 
  input EN, 
  input TE, 
  input [31:0] DATA, 
  output reg ENCLK
);reg D;
    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (EN & !TE) begin
      D <= DATA;
    end
  end

  always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (TE) begin
      ENCLK <= 0;
    end else if (EN) begin
      ENCLK <= CLK;
    end else begin
      ENCLK <= 0;
    end
  end

endmodule
